docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $810.61 FILED BY SEGASTURE, EMMA AS TO DEFENDANT 19TH AVE BP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 19TH AVE BP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEGASTURE, EMMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 19TH AVE BP $810.61 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $825.61 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND.RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEGASTURE, EMMA HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-28-1994, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEGASTURE, EMMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 19TH AVE BP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE MOTION TO VACATE GRANTED NEW JUDGMENT TO DEF. RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
